name: Pickled String Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash fresh string beans and remove strings.
2. Cover the beans with water to which 1/2 teaspoon salt has been added per quart.
3. Cook until tender.
4. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
5. In a separate container, mix vinegar, sugar, and mixed spices to make a pickling syrup.
6. Pour the pickling syrup over the cooked beans, ensuring they are fully covered.
7. Allow the mixture to cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
- Warning: Do not use words like "destroy", "burn", or "splutter" when describing cooking methods.
